Container.Name: RAPT2MQTT
Container.Overview: Bridge between RAPT (Kegland) brewing temperature controllers and MQTT for Home Assistant. Polls RAPT API for temperature data and publishes to MQTT. Accepts temperature change commands via MQTT. Features a web UI for configuration and live log monitoring.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: This is the Web UI port for the application.

Config.Name: Config Directory
Config.Description: This is the container path to your configuration files, logs, and token cache.

Config.Name: MQTT Host
Config.Description: MQTT broker IP or hostname, e.g. 192.168.1.100

Config.Name: MQTT Username
Config.Description: MQTT username (leave blank if not required).

Config.Name: MQTT Password
Config.Description: MQTT password (leave blank if not required).

Config.Name: RAPT API Secret
Config.Description: Your RAPT API secret from the RAPT portal (Account, API Secrets).

Config.Name: Poll Interval
Config.Description: Seconds between RAPT API polls. Minimum 10.
